name: The Back Nine
address: 336 Main St Suite C, Wray, CO 80758
about: The Back Nine is a golf simulator venue featuring state-of-the-art HD Golf Simulators combined with a top shelf whiskey and cocktail bar. The venue offers both per-bay hourly rentals and tiered membership options, with capabilities for solo practice, group outings, and private events. Located in Wray, Colorado, it is designed as a social hub for golfers and non-golfers alike to enjoy simulated golf in a relaxed setting with full bar service.
why_golfers_like_it: Flexible membership plans with significant discounts
Top shelf whiskey and cocktail bar for a complete social experience
Ability to rent both bays simultaneously for group events

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available for food service
Top shelf whiskey and cocktail bar with premium brands like Crown Royal Reserve, Russell's Reserve Single Barrel, and Van Winkle Special Reserve

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art golf simulators with advanced tracking capabilities

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but club heads must be clean to protect the simulators. Club rentals are also available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed as the venue has a full kitchen and top shelf whiskey and cocktail bar available for customers.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Reservations can be made for up to 4 hours of continuous play time, allowing ample time for a full 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, kids under 15 years old can play at no additional cost when accompanied by a parent or guardian.
